dataset: FRC Overlay Friction Index — Historical Series
description: Quarterly OFI values tracking US mortgage lender overlay strictness. 0=agency minimums only, 100=extreme restriction. First systematic time series of underwriting overlay behavior.
methodology: Agency guideline comparison across 7 lender categories, anonymous denial data, 23-year underwriting pattern analysis. Not specific named lenders.
citation: FinanceRateCalc Research. (2026). FRC Overlay Friction Index Historical Series. financeratecalc.com/frc-ofi-data.json

OFI.description: Overlay Friction Index — aggregate overlay strictness

history.note: Peak tightening cycle, 640+ credit overlays widespread
Conservative banks beginning to tighten again
DTI overlay compression at large lenders, Non-QM offsetting

FHA_Flexibility_Tracker.description: % of FHA lenders following agency minimums without overlay

SSDI_Acceptance_Rate.description: Estimated % of lenders applying agency-standard SSDI gross-up

active_q2_2026.name: Conservative DTI Compression
active_q2_2026.description: Large bank overlays reducing DTI caps from 50% toward 43-47%

active_q2_2026.name: Non-QM Loosening
active_q2_2026.description: Bank statement programs reducing history requirement 24→12 months

active_q2_2026.name: SSDI Acceptance Recovery
active_q2_2026.description: Fair lending pressure improving SSDI gross-up application

active_q2_2026.name: VA Residual Income Strength
active_q2_2026.description: VA specialist lenders holding near agency minimums
